message:

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "harbor: Proxy Cache project not working on v2.15.0",
+    "description": "Proxy Cache project not working on v2.15.0. This issue affects 11+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify harbor troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your harbor setup:\nCheck your harbor dependency version in your project manifest.\nCheck your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review harbor configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant harbor configuration:\nProject with Proxy Cache type not working with `v2.15.0` with message below\n```\nError response from daemon: unknown: artifact mirror/portainer/portainer-ce:lts not found\n```\n\ntry to  docker pull any image from the proxy cache project and message"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Proxy Cache project not working on v2.15.0",
+        "description": "set user agent to avoid some registry (e.g. docker hub) return 403 when user agent is not set to harbor-registry-client\r\n\nThank you for contributing to Harbor!\n\n# Comprehensive Summary of your change\n\n# Issue being fixed\nFixes #(issue)\n\nPlease indicate you've done the following:\n```yaml\nError response from daemon: unknown: artifact mirror/portainer/portainer-ce:lts not found\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Proxy Cache project not working on v2.15.0 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest harbor to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "set user agent to avoid some registry (e.g. docker hub) return 403 when user agent is not set to harbor-registry-client\r\n\nThank you for contributing to Harbor!\n\n# Comprehensive Summary of your change\n\n# Issue being fixed\nFixes #(issue)\n\nPlease indicate you've done the following:",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Error response from daemon: unknown: artifact mirror/portainer/portainer-ce:lts not found",
+        "cd /path/to/harbor\n \n# set build variables\nexport BASEIMAGETAG=dev\nexport BASEIMAGENAMESPACE=goharbor\n \n# 1. compile go-binaries\nmake compile -e DEVFLAG=false\n \n# 2. prepare versions\nmake prepare -e DEVFLAG=false\n \n# 3. build docker images\nmake build -e DEVFLAG=false",
+        "POST https://hub.docker.com/v2/users/login/\n{\"username\": \"xxx\", \"password\": \"xxx\"}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
